title: Register of Cabinet Office Board Member’s Interests 2025-26
body: "The Cabinet Office maintains a register of the private interests held by members of its board.  The purpose of the register is to give board members the mechanism to publicly declare any private interests which may conflict, or may be perceived to conflict, with their public duties.  This document is a record of the private interests declared by Cabinet Office board members for the period 2025 to 2026. "
